type: Publication-Ready Bar Chart（学术出版级条形图）
goal: 生成一张论文中常见的 SWE-bench 风格方法对比 bar chart 的视觉版，白底、误差棒、数值顶标

title.text: SWE-bench Verified — Resolve Rate (agent trajectories, single run)
title.subtitle: End-to-end patch submission on full benchmark split; illustrative only

color_rule.default: slate blue #64748B for baselines; orange #D97706 for the last bar (Ours)

value_labels.rule: show values above each bar, e.g. 12.5, 18.0, 22.0, 13.0, 26.5 (illustrative)

error_bars.style: ±1 std over 3 random seeds, thin black T
error_bars.annotation: in caption: error bars show ±1 std (illustrative)

significance_markers.rule: bracket between Ours and best baseline with ** p<0.01 (illustrative, not a real p-value claim)

caption.label: Figure 3.
caption.text: Resolve rate on SWE-bench Verified. Ours uses iterative retrieval over repo structure + unit-test–guided repair. Numbers are for visual communication only; run official harness for true scores.
